description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service and a variable DOCKER_IMAGE set to registry.gitlab.com/gfelbing/openwall:latest. Define a single stage called build. Add a build-docker job that runs in the build stage, is limited to the master branch, and executes the commands: docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com, docker build -t $DOCKER_IMAGE ., and docker push $DOCKER_IMAGE. No caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined.
